---
title: "calculating-streaks"
format: html
---

# Calculating streaks

With these intervals, it is straightforward to calculate the streaks of consecutive days. We can use the `rle()` function, which stands for "run length encoding". This function takes a logical vector and returns the lengths of consecutive runs of `TRUE` values.  






https://stackoverflow.com/questions/71402651/run-length-encoding-within-sql-query
